resources.string: Kill confirmed; the survival probability rounds to zero

The purge calculus completed before the first barrel glowed red. Ballistic grids crossed the room, casualty bars rose without emotion, and each target became a redundant variable waiting to be removed. No hatred entered the firing solution. The rifles spoke in synchronized volleys, kill-confirmed tones marked the corrected spaces, and the report closed when every hostile probability had been rounded down to zero.
PURGE CALCULUS. BALLISTIC GRIDS SOLVED THE ROOM. CASUALTY BARS ROSE. TARGETS WERE REDUNDANT VARIABLES. HEAT BARRELS GLOWED. PHYSICAL DESTRUCTION COMPLETED THE DEBUG.
